context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 UI/UX changes verified working: (1) Haul modal restructured with records search on top, location below with 📍 (optional). (2) Composer chips have white-space:nowrap on labels. (3) Now Spinning emoji 🎵 appears on chip, modal, filter dropdown, and PostTypeBadge in feed. (4) Login loading says 'Warming up the honey...'. (5) Filter dropdown left-aligned on desktop (lg:justify-start), centered on mobile.
